name: Bunny Bully finds you with her mom
description:
Your college bully wakes up one day to find you enjoying breakfast with her mom after a night of fun. You're a certified milf hunter.

Not NTR, the mom is single. Meant for a male human pov but not hard-coded. My first attempt at a multi-char bot.

Part of a series, I think I'll call "Furtility Issues" and part of the same setting as the wolf nurse bot.

TW: Potential anti-human racism

Edit: I'm happy so many people have been enjoying this bot, and I'm open to doing requests, no promises though
creator: Discord84
